allow: PowerShell($pgPath = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; $psql = "$pgPath\\bin\\psql.exe"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "peoplecounter123"; & $psql -U peoplecounter -d peoplecounter -h localhost -c "\\dt" 2>&1)

PowerShell($pgPath = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; $psql = "$pgPath\\bin\\psql.exe"; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE USER peoplecounter WITH PASSWORD 'peoplecounter123';" 2>&1)

PowerShell($pgPath = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; $psql = "$pgPath\\bin\\psql.exe"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "SELECT version\(\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\admin-it\\people-counter\\detection"; pip install -r requirements.txt 2>&1 | Tee-Object "$env:TEMP\\pip-install.log" | Select-String "Successfully installed|error|ERROR" | Select-Object -Last 5)
PowerShell(C:\\pcvenv\\Scripts\\pip.exe install ultralytics 2>&1 | Tee-Object "$env:TEMP\\ultralytics-install.log" | Select-String "Successfully|Error|WARNING" | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\admin-it\\people-counter\\detection"; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\pcvenv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\detection.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\detection-err.log" -NoNewWindow -PassThru | Select-Object Id)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\detection-err.log" | Select-Object -Last 5; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode, Content)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "python" } | Select-Object Name, Id, CPU, WorkingSet)
PowerShell(python -m pip install fastapi uvicorn httpx --quiet 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -c "import fastapi, cv2; print\('fastapi:', fastapi.__version__, '| cv2:', cv2.__version__\)" 2>&1)
